description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define two jobs: a pages job that runs the command hugo, stores the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch, thereby publishing the site to GitLab Pages; and a test job that also runs hugo but is executed on all branches except master. Both jobs use the default stage and have no caches or services.
